paper.title_en: Time-Crystalline Phase in a Single-Band Holographic Superconductor
paper.abstract_en: We investigate the emergence of a time-crystalline phase in a single-band holographic superconductor, extending the AdS/CFT framework. By incorporating a nonlinear gauge-scalar coupling and external driving, we derive coupled equations of motion for the plasma and Higgs modes, analogous to those in high-Tc superconductors. Multi-scale analysis reveals a sum resonance with subharmonic growth indicating broken time-translation symmetry. We perform numerical computation of quasinormal mode and demonstrate the transition to the time-crystalline phase. The holographic model may serve as a robust tool for studying strongly coupled time crystals.

decision.selection_reason_zh: 论文研究全息超导体中的时间晶体相，属于全息凝聚态物理领域，理论深度高，方法新颖，清晰度高。
decision.title_zh: 单带全息超导体中的时间晶体相
decision.abstract_zh: 我们研究了单带全息超导体中时间晶体相的出现，扩展了AdS/CFT框架。通过引入非线性规范-标量耦合和外部驱动，我们推导了等离子体模和Higgs模的耦合运动方程，类似于高温超导体中的方程。多尺度分析揭示了一个和共振，其次谐波增长表明时间平移对称性破缺。我们进行了准正则模的数值计算，并演示了向时间晶体相的转变。该全息模型可作为研究强耦合时间晶体的鲁棒工具。
